sections.title: Indexes Overview
sections.text: Map of every index-like structure: per-column accelerators, HNSW vector index, linked columns, partition pruning, CSR graph index

sections.title: What an index means in Rayforce
sections.text: Precomputed structure that rides alongside the data, opt-in, mutation-aware, transient by default

sections.title: The five index-like structures
sections.text: .idx.zone .idx.hash .idx.sort .idx.bloom HNSW linked columns partition pruning CSR forward reverse

sections.title: Pick the right kind
sections.text: Decision matrix mapping query shape to index kind, active today vs. inspectable only, .idx.* not yet consulted

sections.title: What is wired today
sections.text: .idx.* built and inspectable but not consulted, HNSW (ann) consults directly, linked column dereference, partition pruning optimizer pass, CSR transparent

sections.title: Accelerator Indexes
sections.text: Per-column accelerator structures zone hash sort bloom attached to numeric vectors, build inspect drop, .idx.zone .idx.hash .idx.sort .idx.bloom .idx.has? .idx.info .idx.drop

sections.title: Quick Pick
sections.text: Decision table: zone for range-check, hash for equality, sort for binary search, bloom for membership rejection — capabilities arrive after optimizer routing pass

sections.title: Why Per-Column Indexes
sections.text: Morsel-driven columnar execution scans linearly today; .idx.* will route filter in find distinct after optimizer pass lands

sections.title: Constructing an Index
sections.text: (.idx.zone v) (.idx.hash v) (.idx.sort v) (.idx.bloom v) attach builtins, idempotent, .idx.info inspect

sections.title: Introspection and Lifecycle
sections.text: .idx.has? .idx.info .idx.drop, mutation drops the index, slice has no index, coexistence with linked columns

sections.title: Common Workflows
sections.text: Hot column repeated lookups with .idx.hash, range scans with .idx.sort, whole-column pruning with .idx.zone

sections.title: Performance Characteristics
sections.text: Build cost zone hash bloom O(n) sort O(n log n), space O(n) bloom O(m) bits, query cost binary search O(log n) hash O(1)

sections.title: Storage and Lifetime
sections.text: RAY_INDEX child ray_t, ray_index_t, nullmap union, refcounting clone-on-detach, no on-disk persistence

sections.title: Caveats and Limits
sections.text: Numeric types only, sym str deferred, one slot per column, in-memory only, no optimizer routing yet

sections.title: Quick Reference
sections.text: .idx.zone .idx.hash .idx.sort .idx.bloom .idx.drop .idx.has? .idx.info attach builtins

sections.title: Indexes Guide
sections.text: Procedural guide: when to bother building, choosing a kind, worked workflows, lifecycle gotchas, performance characteristics

sections.title: When to bother building an index
sections.text: One-shot scans don't build, repeated point lookups, range queries on stable columns, structural fit vs observable speedup

sections.title: Choosing an accelerator kind
sections.text: Equality probes hash, range queries sort, segment pruning zone, membership rejection bloom, structurally suited but not yet consulted

sections.title: Workflow: hot column repeated lookups
sections.text: .idx.hash on a numeric vector, build inspect drop, mutation auto-drops

sections.title: Workflow: ANN over embeddings
sections.text: hnsw-build cosine l2 ip metric, ann nearest-neighbor query, hnsw-free, brute-force knn for small sets

sections.title: Workflow: cross-table reference via linked columns
sections.text: .col.link row-id reference dereference, foreign-key style, no separate index structure

sections.title: Workflow: partition pruning on parted tables
sections.text: Date int sym partitioning, optimizer pruning pass, where filter on Date column

sections.title: Lifecycle gotchas
sections.text: Mutation drops the index, quoted-symbol form, slices can't carry index, one slot per column, no .idx.* persistence, numeric only v1

sections.title: Performance characteristics
sections.text: Build cost space query cost table, .idx.* inspectable only, HNSW consulted by (ann), linked column dereference, partition pruning optimizer pass
